Manifest Elements  

Description

1: Summon Pet: PCPetMagS12L059Epic

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 500 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: Instant Recast Time: 0
Fizzle Time: 0 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

You cast: By your will the elements begin to take shape.
Other cast: Soandso begins to shape the elements.

Game Description

Forms the primal elements into a powerful servant.

Items with this effect

  • Orb of Mastery
  • Ring of Ice

Quick Facts

ClassLevel
MAG59
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (46)
  • Screenshots
Add Image
Post Comment
Not level 59
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2013 at 6:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1604881094268
1 post
The spell requirement on the mage 1.0 is level 50. However, when you memorize the spell to summon the orb, that is level 45. I'm not sure why the spell is listed here as level 59.
▲ Page top
Not level 59
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2022 at 7:13 PM Rating: Good
VonsneerTheScoundrel
Scholar
39 posts
The effective level of the pet is 59. This is done so that pet focus items that affect certain level ranges will work on Manifest Elements. The pet itself is 49, when focused with minion of darkness the pet becomes level 50. I believe Summoner's Boon also works with the Epic Pet but it's less potent.
▲ Page top
Ring of Ice
QuoteReply
# Jan 01 2009 at 7:14 AM Rating: Decent

I think there is some confusion
QuoteReply
# Dec 18 2008 at 5:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773725878
Scholar
26 posts
I think this spell/effect is the AA ability gained by the Magican transforming themselves into the form of an elemental.

This is listed as a level 59 spell and it is probably not coincidence that you can first spend your AA's on this effect at level 59.

#REDACTED, Posted: May 28 2004 at 8:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) SumMageMultiElement? What kind of junky name is that? ya.. that's SOOO original. How long did it take to come up with that name? 8, 1, maybe 2 minutes? bahh.

QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2004 at 8:49 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591805558809
25 posts
That isn't the spell name, its the tech name the server uses when you casting.... Its computer terms, the only reason we know the true name is using databases like lucy or cheating programs.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 22 2004 at 1:18 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 4 years ago the mages epic was the **** due in part to only 50 levels in the game. The mages epic pet is level 49th at that time he was the ****** now he is junk compared to 60+ pets
RE: guessing
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2004 at 5:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772
Scholar
435 posts
"now he is junk compared to 60+ pets"

Not true. It's been pretty well established by parsing that Fluffy provides substantially more DPS in normal LDoN adventures than the 61+ pets, even at level 65. Fighting level 60+ mobs his DPS will be lower than the high-level pets, but up to mid/high 50s mobs where his procs can hit, Fluffy is the better choice.

Still, an upgrade to level 59 would be great: however, it would probably make him the pet of choice in any groups other than for tanking (and possibly even then) and I doubt SoE would do that.

Edited, Fri Apr 23 18:47:30 2004
▲ Page top
RE: guessing
QuoteReply
# May 04 2005 at 7:14 PM Rating: Decent
Gelloc
13 posts

i have 2 Epic'd magi i duel'd my lvl 61 air pet with my 56 mage(Epic) Unbuffed both the Epic pet held even and in the end killed the 61 air pet with 5% health left , buffed both with highest lvl spell each could and let pets have at it Epic chewed through the 61 air had 30% left after he killed the pet , this pet is wicked , tho i see a definate decrease in proc on PoP mobs unless you throw a Mala on the mob then pet does good, now my 64 mage had been healing the pet and the 61 cleaned the epic'd clock, lvl 56 pet heal suxs and the 64 pet heal helped alot, was fun to play with and i keep epic pet in standby while in PoP with 61+ pet just incase, but by no means is the pet worthless , have fun with the pets they are the backbone we stand behind hehe . be well
▲ Page top
RE: guessing
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2005 at 8:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782793772

435 posts

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 28 2004 at 2:55 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Levels were not raised until Velious came out to 60. Far as the epic goes..its not the pet..its the spell that is epic..summoning a wand with very nice stats...

Confused
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2004 at 3:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791928377
22 posts
I dont get it. If this is simply the pet summoned by the mage epic why is it listed at level 59 when you can summon the orb at level 46?
▲ Page top
RE: Confused
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2004 at 9:09 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592257278576
Scholar
53 posts
You can summon your epic, using the spell, at lvl 46. But, the effect on the epic cant be used until your in your 50's. I've heard 55, but it very well may be 59.

I had a chance to test this in beta. I had a lvl 45 MAG, dinged him, updated his spells, and poof, there was his epic. When I summoned the orb and tried to use its effects it said my will wasn't sufficient to wield this weapon, or whatever.
So, the effect isn't lvl 46, just the spell which creates the epic.

Edited, Thu Apr 15 10:09:27 2004
▲ Page top
RE: Confused
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2005 at 12:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966545113
7 posts
You can summon orb at 46 and summon pet at 50.

kicks (dont ask me how)
Bashes

Proc for 160 dd (like water elemental dd)
4300 HPS (4.3k)
50 DS

Nice stuff!!

▲ Page top
Pet Info
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2003 at 3:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591762935568
View User Forum
Scholar
42 posts
This spell is the right click effect on the Mage epic. It summons a level 49 pet. This pet quads for 81 damage. It can also bash and kick like most other pets. It casts a self DS that does 50 points of unresistable damage to anything that hits it. Every 12 seconds it casts a stun that does 84 damage and stuns the mob for 3 seconds. Every time the pet swings it has a chance to proc a 143 damage nuke. Thats some serious DPS :)

Here are the names of the spells the pet uses if you wish to look them up:

AuraofElementalMastery - pet DS
ElementalMasteryBlast - pet proc/nuke
ElementalMasteryStrike - pet stun


Edited, Wed Mar 5 14:45:18 2003
▲ Page top
Proc on the Magician Epic piece
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2003 at 6:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362372854
1 post
I have heard that the pet summoned from the Mage epic is only a mear LVL 49. Could someone please answer me and thell me if this is true. THank you for your time and patience! )
▲ Page top
RE: Proc on the Magician Epic piece
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2003 at 12:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770377803
73 posts
Ok... have to say the level means nothing. I play PVP and I ran into one a mage with this. I was 50 and had a 51 SK with me. We pride ourselves on laying waste to red con PCs. So when we saw an even magician running around with a pet (which we didnt know was the epic at the time) we thought hey easy kill and coin. .. Wrong wrong wrong. I couldnt land a root on the thing to save my life. It was doing so much damage that i couldn't even keep the SK healed cause it was doing more damage than i was healing for. It runs at sow speed and it hits you when you try to turn tail and run. Hard and fast and it stuns and it procs and . .. you die. Nasty nasty nasty.
▲ Page top
RE: Proc on the Magician Epic piece
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2003 at 4:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778733060
11 posts
Ya i have heard its a lvl 49 mage pet but it has 3k hp's and procs a 170 or a 250 dd so its a pretty good pet(this is what i heard)
▲ Page top
RE: Proc on the Magician Epic piece
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2003 at 5:33 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591779055152
View User Forum
Scholar
25 posts
Simply to clarify, yes the epic pet is only level 49. This adds a perplexing porblem for, as many of u may no, it will NOT land its procs most of the time for 60+ mobs that frequently appear in PoP zones.... However, there is a fix to this. A vex thal item (Gloves of Dark Summoning) will act as a focus item to ur epic and PoP pets, in the epics case, boosting all stats, and most importantly, boosting its level. Hope this helps!
▲ Page top
RE: Proc on the Magician Epic piece
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2005 at 3:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253277117
View User Forum
17 posts
The LDoN focus also enhances Epic Pet...

Unbuffed epic *seems* to hit faster and with less misses than WoX fully buffed.

regular max 83 (WoX 85)
crit max 135 (WoX 139)
DD proc 145 (WoX suxor)
DS = 50 self (WoX 48 and eats a spell slot)

Kedge blades seem to proc the same or less, but this may be offsetable by switching to fists.

While faster than any other straight cast pet, his speed did not seem to be sufficient to keep up with RS3, tho I was having lag issues at the time. But still a benefit when in indoor zones.

Out of the box this pet rocks compared to any pet available sub 66. Throw buffs, toys, and armor on and enjoy. BTW, 65 AA's do add to his powah!
